strings.title: # RAG V2 全量实验报告（Phase 2）
strings.s1_1b: ** 题（在原有 70 题基础上增加 Phase 2 扩展题）。
strings.s1_1c: - 新增维度包括：综合类（SYN-P2）、无证据边界（NEG-P2）、出版物深挖（PUB-P2）、**多轮对话链（MULTI-01～15，5 条链 × 3 轮）**。
strings.s2_note: **说明:** 全量单轮评测在 `python -m rag_v2.pipeline` 中实现为：每题前 `session.clear()`，再调用 `ask(..., enable_consistency=True)`，与 **检索+生成主链路** 一致；UI 为提速默认 `enable_consistency=False`。Multi-hop 补检索依赖会话历史中的实体，**独立单题评测**下通常不触发；多轮专项见第 5 节。
strings.s3: ## 3. 核心指标（V2，全量 Phase2 集）
strings.hit_note: > **关于 Hit@3 / Hit@5：** 当前 `eval_retrieval` 仅统计 **原始语料块** 的 `chunk_id` / 文件名是否与 `gold_source_ids` 匹配。当检索结果以 **QA Memory（curated_qa）** 为主时，即使答案正确，也可能记为未命中语料块，因此 Hit@K 与 `evidence_supported_accuracy` 会偏低；解读时应结合 **LLM Judge 的准确度与幻觉率**。
strings.col_bt: | 题型 | N | 行为率 | 平均准确度 | Perfect |
strings.s4_1: ### 4.1 历史基线：V1 在原始 70 题集
strings.s4_2a: ### 4.2 同集对比：V1 vs V2（均为 **
strings.s4_2_intro: 在相同题目与相同 Judge（`rag_v1.pipeline` 的 `LLM_MODEL`）下对比生成质量；**V1 走 V1 检索+生成；V2 走完整 `ask()` 链路（含 HyDE 条件启用、Multi-hop、多样性等）**。
strings.col_cmp: | 指标 | V1 Phase2 | V2 | Δ (V2−V1) |
strings.s5: ## 5. 多轮对话评测（15 题，5 链，会话内指代消解）
strings.s5_intro: 脚本：`test_multiturn_eval.py`；每链独立 `SessionMemory`，LLM-as-Judge 与全量集一致。
strings.col_turn: | 轮次 | 准确度 | 完整性 | 幻觉 |
strings.s7: ## 7. 提示词摘录（实现源码中）
strings.s7_5: ### 7.5 意图分类 LLM 分支（节选）
strings.case_s6: ## 6. 典型案例分析（单轮 + 多轮）
strings.case_intro: 以下案例均来自最近一次评测落盘结果（`rag_v2_eval_results.json`、`multiturn_eval_results.json`），由脚本按 Judge 分数自动筛选；**多轮部分单独成节**，覆盖指代消解与跨话题比较。
strings.case_c_bad: ### 6.2 单轮：代表性错误 / 高风险案例
strings.case_c_bad_f: 筛选条件：事实分 ≤1，或行为分 <2（含应拒答却生成、应作答却严重偏题等）。
strings.case_mt_ok: ### 6.3 多轮：正确链路（跨轮上下文 + 比较类）
strings.case_mt_ok_i: 展示 **链 B**（基础设施 vs 社区路径）：首轮建立「Cape Cod Rail」实体后，次轮用「that project」成功消解并与 East Boston 对比；Judge 满分，说明 **Multi-hop 补检索 + 指代消解** 在该类问题上有效。
strings.case_mt_sum: **链级小结：** 首轮检索锁定 Cape Cod 项目；追问比较时 Multi-hop 可补全 East Boston 证据；第三轮 harbor barrier 属三向对比，仍依赖前两轮实体在会话中的可抽取性。
strings.case_mt_bad: ### 6.4 多轮：薄弱 / 部分失分案例
strings.case_mt_bad_i: 以下选取 **事实或完整性未满分** 的追问或末轮，用于说明多轮仍可能出现的边际问题（如金额表述被 Judge 判为不完整、出版物追问细节不足等）。
strings.case_mt_weak0: _（多轮结果集中未筛到薄弱项。）_
strings.case_err0: _（当前结果集中未筛到明显错误单轮题。）_
strings.mt_c1: 1. **指代消解**在 10/10 追问上触发，整体将「it / that project / the survey」写进可检索的完整问句，是正确比较类回答的前提。
strings.mt_c2: 2. **Turn 3** 平均分数低于 Turn 1/2（见 §5），常见原因是问题更综合、证据需跨多个前文主题同时覆盖，Judge 对完整性更严。
strings.mt_c3: 3. **幻觉分偶发偏低**多与检索片段中含人名/项目叙事有关，需结合一致性检查与来源面板人工复核。

mermaid: U[用户问题] --> CR[指代消解 LLM]
SQ -->|其他| RT[单次混合检索]
RT --> MH[Multi-hop 覆盖检查 + 补检索]
CC -->|是| CS[一致性检查 LLM]

case.strong: 高分命中；`{qt}` 下证据与生成对齐良好。
case.refuse_cf: 使用了标准拒答话术，但 Judge 认为与 gold 要求的明确否定/补充说明仍不一致（常见于 no_evidence 边界题）。
case.refuse_elaborate: 无证据题却依据检索片段展开论述，与 gold「无专门工作」冲突，属检索噪声或拒答策略问题。
case.synthesis_refuse: 综合题在证据链不足时整体拒答，可检查子查询分解、HyDE 与 Multi-hop 是否覆盖全部子主题。
case.weak_factual: 事实或要点覆盖不足；建议对照 gold 与当次 `retrieval_log` 做误差归因。
case.default: 见 Judge 说明；可结合 `retrieved_chunks` 与题型复盘。

multiturn.strong: 多轮上下文与检索协同良好；指代消解后的查询与证据匹配。
multiturn.coref_weak: 指代已消解但 Judge 仍判要点不足：可能需在生成提示中强调与 gold 对齐的枚举式要点（金额、时长等）。
multiturn.hall_weak: 幻觉分偏低：检索块中含扩展叙事，模型未充分裁剪；可结合一致性检查复核。
multiturn.partial: 部分得分；常见于追问细节或第三轮流式综合比较。

strings.title: # RAG V2 Full Experiment Report (Phase 2)
strings.s1_1b: ** items (70 original items plus Phase 2 extensions).
strings.s1_1c: - New coverage: synthesis (SYN-P2), no-evidence edge cases (NEG-P2), publication deep-dives (PUB-P2), **multi-turn chains (MULTI-01–15, 5 chains × 3 turns)**.
strings.s2_note: **Note:** Batch single-turn eval (`python -m rag_v2.pipeline`) calls `session.clear()` then `ask(..., enable_consistency=True)` per item—same retrieval+generation path as production; the UI skips consistency by default for latency. Multi-hop supplemental retrieval depends on entities in session history and **usually does not fire** when each eval item is isolated; multi-turn metrics are in §5.
strings.s3: ## 3. Core metrics (RAG V2, full Phase 2 set)
strings.hit_note: > **On Hit@3 / Hit@5:** `eval_retrieval` only checks whether **raw corpus** `chunk_id` / filenames match `gold_source_ids`. When the top hits are **QA Memory (`curated_qa`)**, answers can still be correct while corpus Hit@K stays low—interpret together with **LLM-judge accuracy and hallucination**.
strings.col_bt: | Type | N | Behavior | Avg accuracy | Perfect |
strings.s4_1: ### 4.1 Historical baseline: V1 on the original 70-item set
strings.s4_2_intro: Same items and judge (`LLM_MODEL` in `rag_v1.pipeline`). **V1:** V1 retrieve + generate. **V2:** full `ask()` path (conditional HyDE, multi-hop, diversity, etc.).
strings.s5: ## 5. Multi-turn evaluation (15 items, 5 chains, in-session coreference)
strings.s5_intro: Script: `test_multiturn_eval.py`; one `SessionMemory` per chain; same LLM-as-judge as the full set.
strings.case_intro: Examples are taken from the latest saved eval (`rag_v2_eval_results.json`, `multiturn_eval_results.json`), auto-filtered by judge scores; **multi-turn has its own subsection** (coreference + cross-topic comparison).
strings.case_c_bad_f: Filter: factual score ≤1 or behavior <2 (should refuse but answers, or severe off-topic answers, etc.).
strings.case_mt_ok_i: **Chain B** (infrastructure vs community): first turn anchors *Cape Cod Rail*; the follow-up *that project* resolves and compares to East Boston with full judge scores—**multi-hop + coreference** help on this pattern.
strings.case_mt_sum: **Chain summary:** Turn 1 locks Cape Cod evidence; comparison triggers multi-hop for East Boston; turn 3 (harbor barrier) is a three-way contrast and still depends on entities recoverable from session text.
strings.case_mt_bad_i: We list follow-ups or final turns where **factual or completeness scores are not full**, illustrating residual issues (e.g., judge marks amount wording incomplete, publication follow-ups shallow).
strings.case_mt_weak0: _(No weak multi-turn items in this run.)_
strings.case_err0: _(No clear single-turn failures in this filter.)_
strings.mt_c1: 1. **Coreference** fired on 10/10 follow-ups, rewriting *it / that project / the survey* into self-contained queries—prerequisite for good comparison answers.
strings.mt_c2: 2. **Turn 3** averages lower than turns 1–2 (see §5): questions are more integrative and judges score completeness stricter.
strings.mt_c3: 3. **Lower hallucination scores** often co-occur with biography-style snippets in retrieved chunks—cross-check consistency output and the source panel.

case.strong: Strong scores; under `{qt}`, evidence and generation align well.
case.refuse_cf: Standard refusal wording was used, but the judge still disagrees with the gold expected explicit denial / caveats (common on no_evidence edge cases).
case.refuse_elaborate: No-evidence item but the model elaborates from retrieved snippets—conflicts with gold "no dedicated work"; likely retrieval noise or refusal policy.
case.synthesis_refuse: Synthesis item refused wholesale when the evidence chain is thin—check sub-query split, HyDE, and multi-hop coverage across subtopics.
case.weak_factual: Factual or point coverage is weak; compare gold vs this run's `retrieval_log` for error attribution.
case.default: See judge explanation; review `retrieved_chunks` and question type.

multiturn.strong: Multi-turn context and retrieval work well; resolved query matches evidence.
multiturn.coref_weak: Coreference resolved but judge still marks missing points—generation prompt may need stronger enumeration aligned with gold (amounts, durations, etc.).
multiturn.hall_weak: Lower hallucination score: retrieved chunks carry extra narrative; trim more aggressively; cross-check consistency output.
multiturn.partial: Partial credit; common on detail follow-ups or integrative turn-3 comparisons.
